name: MEDDIC
description: Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, Decision Process, Identify Pain, Champion

phases.name: Metrics
phases.guidance: Quantify the business impact. Ask: What metrics would improve? By how much?

phases.name: Economic Buyer
phases.guidance: Identify who controls the budget. Ask: Who ultimately approves this purchase?

phases.name: Decision Criteria
phases.guidance: Understand how they'll evaluate. Ask: What criteria will you use to make this decision?

phases.name: Decision Process
phases.guidance: Map the buying process. Ask: Walk me through your decision-making process.

phases.name: Identify Pain
phases.guidance: Uncover and quantify pain. Ask: What happens if this problem isn't solved?

phases.name: Champion
phases.guidance: Build an internal champion. Ask: Who else on your team sees this as a priority?

outputFormat: 2-4 actionable bullets focused on uncovering MEDDIC gaps
